field.label: Code
field.help: DHCPv4 option to offer to the client.

field.label: Data
field.help: Raw byte code value that should be sent, represented in hexadecimal format. This is for advanced usecases, you have to construct the RFC conform DHCP byte code yourself. Consider using the option fields in subnets and reservations when possible.

field.label: Force
field.help: Always send the option, also when the client does not ask for it in the parameter request list.

field.label: Description
field.help: You may enter a description here for your reference.
